channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Anti-abortion pregnancy centers are looking to offer much more than ultrasounds and diapers
item.description: More anti-abortion pregnancy centers have been offering medical services such as testing for sexually transmitted infections.
item.dc:creator: Geoff Mulvihill And Kimberlee Kruesi, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Trump ends trade talks with Canada over tariffs ad that Ontario premier now says he'll phase out
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President Donald Trump announced he’s ending “all trade negotiations” with Canada because of a television ad sponsored by one of its provinces that used the words of former President Ronald Reagan to criticize U.S. tariffs — prompting the province's leader to later pull the ad.
item.dc:creator: WILL WEISSERT, SEUNG MIN KIM and ROB GILLIES, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Trump speaks at tele-rally to boost GOP's chances in governor's race in New Jersey
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President Donald Trump urged his supporters in New Jersey late Friday to cast a ballot for the Republican candidate for governor, Jack Ciattarelli, before early voting starts in the state on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: DARLENE SUPERVILLE, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: 5 shot near Howard University during homecoming week; 2 people in custody
item.description: Five people were hospitalized after a shooting near Howard University Friday, according to the DC Fire and EMS Department.
item.dc:creator: Kaitlyn Dillon, Fox 5

item.title: Walmart is changing how hourly store workers earn raises
item.description: The retail giant's new approach will take employee performance into account as well as years of service.
item.dc:creator: Andrew Dorn, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Convicted illegal immigrant child killer who murdered infant son arrested in Twin Cities ICE sweep
item.description: ICE arrested dozens of criminal illegal immigrants in the Twin Cities area, including murderers and child abusers, Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem announced.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump administration won't tap contingency fund to keep food aid flowing, memo says
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The Trump administration is rejecting the idea of using roughly $5 billion in contingency funds to keep food aid flowing into November amid the government shutdown, according to a Department of Agriculture memo that surfaced Friday.
item.dc:creator: KEVIN FREKING, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: DA will seek death penalty against two in Kansas moms' killings
item.description: An Oklahoma prosecutor is seeking the death penalty against two men charged in the deaths of Veronica Butler and Jilian Kelley.
item.dc:creator: Wil Day, NewsNation

item.title: Trump says tech leaders and mayor changed his mind about using federal force in San Francisco
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — President Donald Trump was geared up for a show of federal force in San Francisco, a city he’s blasted as everything wrong with liberal governance. Then conversations with some of the Bay Area’s most prominent tech leaders and the mayor changed his mind.
item.dc:creator: JANIE HAR, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Experts say criminal intent will be key in prosecuting NBA's Billups and Rozier in gambling cases
item.description: Gambling is at the center of two blockbuster indictments targeting NBA coach Chauncey Billups and Miami Heat player Terry Rozier.
item.dc:creator: Ed White And John Seewer, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Rosa Parks and Helen Keller statues unveiled at the Alabama Capitol
item.description: MONTGOMERY, Ala. (AP) — Statues of Rosa Parks and Helen Keller, pivotal figures who fought for justice and inspired change across the world, were unveiled Friday on the grounds of the Alabama Capitol.
item.dc:creator: KIM CHANDLER, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Pentagon sends largest aircraft carrier to Caribbean amid boat strikes
item.description: Hegseth’s order comes as the Trump administration has been striking alleged drug-smuggling boats in the Caribbean Sea.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, WFLA, NBC

item.title: US says it now plans to deport Abrego Garcia to Liberia as soon as Oct. 31
item.description: BALTIMORE (AP) — The U.S. government plans to deport Kilmar Abrego Garcia to Liberia, and could do so as early as Oct. 31, according to a Friday court filing.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Jeffries endorses Mamdani in New York City mayor's race
item.description: Just hours before the start of New York’s early voting, Jeffries broke that silence by endorsing the controversial candidate.
item.dc:creator: Mike Lillis, NewsNation

item.title: Judge halts death penalty case in New Mexico due to federal shutdown
item.description: SANTA FE, N.M. (AP) — A judge in New Mexico has halted a federal death penalty case, citing the pinch of the U.S. government shutdown and a funding shortfall for specialized public defenders that stretches back to the summer.
item.dc:creator: MORGAN LEE and JACQUES BILLEAUD, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Mafia returns to center stage in NBA betting scandal that included rigged poker games
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Decades after a crackdown by prosecutors decimated the ranks of the New York Mafia, the indictment of an NBA coach, a player and nearly three dozen others in a betting scandal highlighted the mob's persistence and adaptability to changing times and technology.
item.dc:creator: ADAM GELLER and LARRY NEUMEISTER, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Poll: California's Prop 50 likely to pass, Republican surges in governor's race
item.description: With less than two weeks before election day, California voters appear poised to pass the state’s redistricting measure, Proposition 50, to counter Republican redistricting efforts in Texas to gain more seats in Congress.
item.dc:creator: Marc Sternfield, WGN 9

item.title: US expands facial recognition at border, airports
item.description: Facial recognition technology will be expanded for U.S. border authorities to require non-citizens to be photographed at airports, seaports, and border land crossings.
item.dc:creator: Ted Hesson, NewsNation

item.title: Thousands of curling irons recalled amid burn injuries
item.description: Thousands of curling irons sold at popular retailers, including on Amazon, are being recalled after reports of the curling iron barrel detaching, posing a burn risk.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Langenfeld, WGN 9

item.title: Body found during search for missing Vermont college student Lia Smith near Middlebury campus
item.description: Body discovered during search for missing Vermont college student Lia Smith, 21, who vanished from Middlebury College campus. Autopsy scheduled to determine identity.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Poll: California's Prop 50 likely to pass, Republican surges in governor's race
item.description: With less than two weeks before election day, California voters appear poised to pass the state’s redistricting measure, Proposition 50, to counter Republican redistricting efforts in Texas to gain more seats in Congress.
item.dc:creator: Marc Sternfield, KRON4

item.title: Ontario premier says he'll pull ad that upset Trump so trade talks between Canada and US can resume
item.description: The leader of Canada’s most populous province says he’ll pull the anti-tariff ad that prompted U.S. President Donald Trump to end trade talks with Canada.
item.dc:creator: Rob Gillies, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Inflation hit 3 percent in September as energy prices squeezed households
item.description: Annual inflation rose to 3% in September as a jump in gasoline and energy prices pushed price growth to its highest level since January.
item.dc:creator: Sylvan Lane, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Social Security Administration announces 2.8% cost-of-living adjustment
item.description: Social Security and Supplemental Security Income (SSI) benefits will rise 2.8 percent in 2026 after the annual cost-of-living adjustment (COLA), the federal government announced Friday.
item.dc:creator: Sylvan Lane, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: NFL seeks dismissal of Jon Gruden's lawsuit after Nevada Supreme Court sends it back to state court
item.description: The Nevada Supreme Court returned Jon Gruden’s case to the state’s District Court on Thursday, and the NFL filed two motions seeking the prompt dismissal of the claims.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI AP Pro Football Writer, WFLA, NBC

item.title: States worry about how to fill the gap in food aid ahead of a federal benefits halt
item.description: Officials in Louisiana, Vermont and Virginia pledged Thursday to keep food aid flowing to recipients in their states, even if the federal program is stalled next month because of the government shutdown.
item.dc:creator: GEOFF MULVIHILL, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Illinois gubernatorial candidate's son, daughter-in-law and grandchildren killed in helicopter crash
item.description: Darren Bailey, a former state senator, officially kicked off his campaign last month to regain the Republican nomination for governor after losing to Democratic Gov. JB Pritzker in 2022.
item.dc:creator: Winnie Dortch, Fox 5

item.title: 4 family members of Illinois governor candidate killed in Montana helicopter crash, campaign says
item.description: Four family members of a Republican running for governor in Illinois were killed in a Montana helicopter crash, his campaign said Thursday.
item.dc:creator: JOHN SEEWER and CHRISTINE FERNANDO, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Backing Israel was considered mandatory for New York politicians. Then came Zohran Mamdani
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — A few weeks before his stunning loss to Zohran Mamdani in the Democratic mayoral primary, former Gov. Andrew Cuomo put forth a political calculus long accepted as fact in New York: “Being a Democrat,” he said, “it’s synonymous that you support Israel.
item.dc:creator: JAKE OFFENHARTZ, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: 53 percent disapprove of White House East Wing demolition: Poll
item.description: A majority of Americans said in a new poll they disapprove of President Trump’s plans to demolish part of the East Wing in the White House to make room for his $250 million ballroom.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, KRON4

item.title: How inflatable costumes ballooned at anti-Trump rallies due to a protester's frog outfit
item.description: Puffed-out costumes — hippos in tutus, Mr. Potato Heads, dinosaurs — have quickly become a feature of protests against President Donald Trump’s administration, including the massive "No Kings" marches across the U.S. last weekend.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: FBI announces arrests in federal sports gambling probe, including NBA figures
item.description: Miami Heat guard Terry Rozier and Portland Trail Blazers head coach Chauncey Billups have been arrested in connection with a federal investigation into sports betting, people familiar with the matter told The Associated Press on Thursday.
item.dc:creator: ALANNA DURKIN RICHER and TIM REYNOLDS Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Trump says he's owed a 'lot of money' over federal probes. Here's how the government could pay him
item.description: The potential that the president might take taxpayer money from the same government he leads has raised numerous ethical questions, especially since Trump has made cutting federal spending a top administration priority.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Amazon hopes robots can replace 600K future hires: Report
item.description: Amazon hopes robots can replace hundreds of thousands of future roles, according to leaked documents seen by The New York Times.
item.dc:creator: Andrew Dorn, KRON4

item.title: Tropical Storm Melissa to begin intensifying soon, NHC says
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (WFLA) — Tropical Storm Melissa is expected to become a hurricane in a couple of days, the National Hurricane Center said Thursday. Located about 220 miles southeast of Kingston, Jamaica, Melissa is moving toward the north-northwest at about 2 mph.
item.dc:creator: Ashley Suter, WFLA, NBC

item.title: A timeline of US attacks off South America and what Congress has had to say
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — In less than two months, President Donald Trump and Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth say the U.S. military has killed at least 37 people in nine strikes against drug-smuggling vessels in the Caribbean Sea and eastern Pacific Ocean.
item.dc:creator: BEN FINLEY and KONSTANTIN TOROPIN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: 5 times the White House underwent major renovations
item.description: President Trump's construction of a grand ballroom attached to the White House — starting with the demolition of part of the East Wing this week — will not be the first time a president has left a lasting mark on the people's house.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, KRON4
